title: [IR] DE_Ket's Global Train Pack For Immersive Railroading
description: [IR] DE_Ket's Global Train Pack For Immersive Railroading. Train From various region,like America, China, Japan, Australia etc..
body:
## **This pack is made by DE_Ket, made for Immersive Railroading mod**

Do not republish or use the model for commercial use
share please with URL to this page

## **Rolling-Stock List：**
### America：
- 🇺🇸 F40PH/R Diesel-Locomotive
- 🇺🇸 PRR GE GG1 Electric-Locomotive
- 🇺🇸 GE E60CP Electric-Locomotive 
- 🇺🇸 AEM-7 Electric-Locomotive
- 🇺🇸 Amfleet 1 Coach, Cafe, Control Car, Inspect Car
- 🇺🇸 Comet II Coach, Control Car
- 🇺🇸 Bombardier Bi-Level Coach, Control Car
- 🇺🇸 Nippon Sharyo Gallery Coach, Control Car
  
- 🇺🇸 Budd RDC-2 Rail-Diesel-Car (With livery from 🇺🇸USAmerica, 🇦🇺Australia, 🇧🇷Brazil, 🇨🇦Canada, 🇨🇺Cuba )
  
- 🇺🇸 New-Haven Kawasaki M8 EMU
- 🇺🇸 Highliner2 EMU

### Asia：
- 🇨🇳 CR CR400BFC EMU
  
- 🇯🇵 JGR 8620 Steam-Locomotive
- 🇯🇵 JGR D51 Steam-Locomotive
- 🇯🇵 EF66 Electric-Locomotive
- 🇯🇵 F6 Shunting Machine
  
- 🇯🇵 20-Series Sleeper Train (Coach, Sleepe, Dining Car)
- 🇯🇵 OHa35-Series Coach
  
- 🇯🇵 583-Series Sleeper EMU
  
- 🇯🇵 Tokyo Metro 6000 Series EMU (With Indonesia KAI Livery)
- 🇯🇵 JRE E235-0 Series EMU
- 🇯🇵 JRE E235-1000 Series EMU
- 🇯🇵 JRE E233-3000 Series EMU
### Australia：
- 🇦🇺 Queensland Diesel-Tilt-Train DMU
